title: clerodendrum putre
intro: Clerodendrum putre, also known as the Turmeric Vine, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible rhizomes. The rhizomes of the Clerodendrum putre plant are known for their medicinal properties, containing compounds like turmeric, curcumin, and gingerol, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum putre include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
